title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in after multiple attempts. Password reset link is not working.

title: Payment Failed but Money Deducted
description: Customer reports payment was deducted but order confirmation was not received.

title: Unable to Update Profile
description: Customer cannot update profile information. Save button is not responding.

title: Order Not Delivered
description: Customer has not received their order even after the expected delivery date.

title: App Crashing on Startup
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer was charged twice for the same subscription plan.

title: Feature Request - Dark Mode
description: Customer requested a dark mode feature for better night usability.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving any email notifications from the system.

title: Unable to Upload Documents
description: Customer cannot upload required documents. Upload button shows error.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund 7 days ago but has not received any update.
